mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, channel, message, status, retry_count, trial, sent_at, created_at FROM notification_log WHERE status = 'FAILED' ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_log (user_id, channel, message, status, retry_count, trial, sent_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{channel}, #{message}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{trial}, #{sentAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_log WHERE status = #{status}
